_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of access control models (Role Based Access Control, Attribute Based Access Control).
reference_document_element_description: Manage data platform access controls, including role definitions, permission grants, access reviews, and privilege escalation procedures.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-010 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-006 (RC, cosine: 0.570), DA-K-016 (DA, cosine: 0.570).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.550). Shared vocabulary: [access, role]. DCWF-only terms [attribute, based, control, knowledge, models] vs WIDAI-only terms [controls, data, definitions, escalation, grants, manage] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.871, R=0.876). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of access control models (Role Based Access Control, Attribute Based A" and "Manage data platform access controls, including role definitions, permission gra" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.593 ≈ STS 0.550 (gap 0.043). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [access, role] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.5%. Shared tokens: [access, role]. DCWF-only: [attribute, based, control, knowledge, models]. WIDAI-only: [controls, data, definitions, escalation, grants, manage].
